notes:
In order for Mobius to successfully update, you must raise your system's maximum open file limit. In systemd based systems, this is set by DefaultLimitNOFILE in /etc/systemd/user.conf. You can verify that it is set correctly by entering ulimit -Hn in the terminal. By default, it is 4096. You should set this to a very large value, such as 1048576 and then restart.
Full disclosure it has been a long time since I've done this and it may be set in multiple places, verify with your distro's community.

Must be run in DX11 mode. OpenGL crashes on launch. News panel still does not work.
